steps.title: Find the vertex x-coordinate
steps.content: The vertex of a parabola lies halfway between its roots: $$x=\frac{-3+(-1)}{2}=-2$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The value $-2$ lies in the interval $-3\lt x\lt1$. Choice B is correct.

steps.title: Eliminate endpoint traps
steps.content: Choices C and D start with $-2lt x$, which does not include $x=-2$ because the inequality is strict. Choice A is left of both roots. Only choice B actually contains $-2$.
